name: Próspera
tagline: Building a startup city on Honduras' Roatan Island
description: Próspera is a special economic zone and charter city project on the island of Roatán, Honduras. It operates under a special legal framework (ZEDE) that allows for alternative governance structures, attracting entrepreneurs and innovators seeking regulatory flexibility.
joinInfo: Apply for residency or e-residency through their website. Visit for tours and events.

name: Cabin
tagline: Building a decentralized city for creators
description: Cabin is building a network of coliving neighborhoods for people who want to live and work near nature while staying connected to an online community. Members can stay at various Cabin neighborhoods around the world.
joinInfo: Apply through their website for citizenship or neighborhood stays.

name: Zuzalu
tagline: A pop-up city fostering innovation and cultural exchange
description: Zuzalu was a first-of-its-kind popup city experiment that brought together 200 residents for two months in Montenegro in 2023. It explored themes of longevity, public goods, network states, and zero-knowledge technology. The model has since inspired numerous spinoff events.
joinInfo: Check the Zuzalu documentation for upcoming events and collaboration opportunities.

name: Praxis
tagline: Building a new city that enables us to live more vital lives
description: Praxis is building a new city focused on vitality—advancing human flourishing through better governance, health, and community. They are assembling a community of builders and acquiring land for their first physical location in the Mediterranean region.
joinInfo: Apply for citizenship through their website. Various membership tiers available.

name: Culdesac
tagline: Building a car-free neighborhood
description: Culdesac is America's first car-free neighborhood built from scratch. Located in Tempe, Arizona, residents live without personal cars in a walkable community with shared amenities, courtyards, and easy access to transit.
joinInfo: Apply for an apartment through their website. Currently open for leasing.

name: Network School
tagline: A startup society for tech founders, AI creators, and remote workers
description: Network School is a physical campus and online community founded by Balaji Srinivasan. It brings together tech founders, AI creators, and remote workers in the Singapore-Johor Special Economic Zone to learn, build, and network.
joinInfo: Apply through the Network School website for admission.

name: Satoshi Island
tagline: Building a crypto community in Vanuatu
description: Satoshi Island is an ambitious project to build a crypto-focused community on a private island in Vanuatu. The project aims to create a physical home for the crypto community with sustainable infrastructure and blockchain-native governance.
joinInfo: Purchase citizenship NFTs or apply through their website.

name: CityDAO
tagline: Building a blockchain-native city
description: CityDAO is a decentralized autonomous organization working to build a city on the blockchain. They've purchased land in Wyoming and are experimenting with collective land ownership and governance through NFTs and tokens.
joinInfo: Join by purchasing a Citizen NFT or participating in governance.

name: Afropolitan
tagline: Building a pan-African digital nation
description: Afropolitan is building the first Internet Country, enabling Africans globally to build abundant lives. The project combines digital citizenship with physical community spaces across Africa, Brazil, and the USA.
joinInfo: Apply for citizenship through their Typeform application.

name: Liberland
tagline: Creating a new libertarian country based on personal and economic freedom
description: The Free Republic of Liberland is a self-proclaimed micronation on the western bank of the Danube river, between Croatia and Serbia. Founded on libertarian principles, it aims to create a nation with minimal government and maximum individual freedom.
joinInfo: Apply for e-residency or citizenship through the official website.

name: Nation3
tagline: Building a web3 solarpunk society
description: Nation3 is building a sovereign cloud nation—a digital-first nation state with its own jurisdiction, passport NFTs, and governance system. The vision is to create a solarpunk society that exists primarily online.
joinInfo: Acquire a Nation3 passport NFT to become a citizen.

name: City of Telosa
tagline: Creating an economic system where citizens have a stake in the city's land
description: Telosa is a planned utopian city in the American desert founded by Marc Lore. The city will feature innovative urban design, sustainable infrastructure, and a new economic model called Equitism where residents share in the land value appreciation.
joinInfo: Sign up for updates and contact through their website.

name: Edge Esmeralda
tagline: A month-long gathering for people building a brighter future
description: Edge Esmeralda is a popup city event that brings together builders, creators, and innovators for an immersive month-long experience. Part of the growing Edge City network of popup communities around the world.
joinInfo: Apply through their ticketing platform for upcoming events.

name: Infinita
tagline: Accelerating life extension technologies through a decentralized city model
description: Infinita (formerly Vitalia) is a special economic zone in Próspera, Honduras focused on longevity research and life extension. It brings together researchers, entrepreneurs, and biohackers to accelerate anti-aging technologies.
joinInfo: Apply to attend Infinita events or become a resident.

name: MoonDAO
tagline: Funding challenges that get us closer to a lunar settlement
description: MoonDAO is a decentralized autonomous organization focused on making space exploration accessible to everyone. They fund, collaborate, and compete on challenges that advance humanity's presence in space.
joinInfo: Become a citizen by joining the MoonDAO community.

name: Blue Frontier
tagline: Building the first seastead with innovative governance and sustainable living
description: Blue Frontier (formerly The Seasteading Institute) is working to build permanent floating communities on the ocean. The project aims to create new jurisdictions with innovative governance and sustainable ocean-based living.
joinInfo: Get involved through their website or attend seasteading conferences.

name: Montelibero
tagline: Building a libertarian society in Europe, starting with Montenegro
description: Montelibero is a community project to create a libertarian enclave in Montenegro. Members are relocating to Montenegro to build a community focused on freedom, minimal state intervention, and voluntary cooperation.
joinInfo: Learn how to participate remotely or relocate through their website.

name: Don't Die
tagline: Defeating all causes of human and planetary death, promoting prosperity and longevity
description: Don't Die is Bryan Johnson's movement to reverse aging and promote radical life extension. The community focuses on longevity protocols, health optimization, and building a future where death is optional.
joinInfo: Join the Don't Die community through their website.

name: Plumia
tagline: Building a borderless society for digital nomads
description: Plumia is creating a new kind of country designed for digital nomads and remote workers. The project offers a sense of belonging and community services for location-independent people around the world.
joinInfo: Get involved through their website.

name: Logos
tagline: Creating a self-sovereign, privacy-preserving, decentralized network state
description: Logos is building a trust-minimized, decentralized network state. The project develops technologies for self-sovereignty, privacy, and freedom, including communication tools and governance systems.
joinInfo: Participate through their website and community channels.

name: Gelephu Mindfulness City
tagline: Integrating economic growth with mindfulness and sustainability
description: Gelephu Mindfulness City is an ambitious project by the Kingdom of Bhutan to create a new city that integrates economic development with mindfulness, sustainability, and Gross National Happiness principles.
joinInfo: Engage through the GMC website for opportunities.

name: FREE Madeira
tagline: Promoting Madeira as a hub for Bitcoin and blockchain innovation
description: FREE Madeira is a movement to establish Madeira, Portugal as a Bitcoin-friendly jurisdiction. The initiative works with local government to create favorable conditions for crypto businesses and enthusiasts.
joinInfo: Contact through their website to get involved.

name: Vitalist Bay
tagline: Bringing together the world's leading minds to extend human healthspan
description: Vitalist Bay is a popup city focused on longevity science and healthspan extension. It brings together researchers, entrepreneurs, and biohackers to accelerate progress on anti-aging technologies.
joinInfo: Apply through their website for upcoming events.

name: Kift
tagline: Building a vanlife community
description: Kift is creating a network of mobile living communities for vanlifers and nomads. Members get access to land, resources, and community across multiple locations throughout North America.
joinInfo: Apply for membership through their website.

name: Spectra Cities
tagline: Creating sustainable, human-centered urbanization combining physical and virtual worlds
description: Spectra is building a network of sustainable micro-cities that combine physical placemaking with virtual world-building. The project focuses on creating human-centered, technologically progressive urban environments.
joinInfo: Apply through their website.

name: Cohere
tagline: Creating a global network of coliving communities
description: Cohere is building a network of coliving communities across the Americas. Members can live, work, and connect across multiple locations in Antigua, Ecuador, Brazil, and beyond.
joinInfo: Apply for membership through their website.

name: Porta Norte
tagline: Building a European town integrated with nature
description: Porta Norte is developing a new town in Europe that integrates modern living with nature. The project emphasizes sustainable development, community connection, and quality of life.
joinInfo: Express interest through their Google Form.

name: Tamera
tagline: Empowering people worldwide to build a regenerative, nonviolent culture
description: Tamera is a peace research village in Portugal founded in 1995. The community focuses on developing models for nonviolent coexistence, ecological sustainability, and healing the relationship between humans and nature.
joinInfo: Visit for courses and programs through their website.

name: Ciudad Morazán
tagline: Creating a safe, self-sustaining, and business-friendly community
description: Ciudad Morazán is a private city development in Honduras offering industrial, residential, and commercial spaces. The project operates under Honduras' ZEDE framework with its own governance structure.
joinInfo: Contact through their website for residency or business opportunities.

name: Itana by Talent Cities
tagline: Building a remote-work-friendly city in Nigeria's Lekki Free Zone
description: Itana is developing a modern, tech-enabled city in Nigeria's Lekki Free Trade Zone. The project aims to create a hub for African tech talent and remote workers with world-class infrastructure.
joinInfo: Apply through their Typeform.

name: Zu Grama
tagline: Catapulting India's innovation ecosystem by connecting local talent with international experts
description: Zu Grama is a popup city initiative in India that brings together local entrepreneurs, researchers, and international innovators. The project aims to accelerate India's tech and startup ecosystem through intensive collaboration events.
joinInfo: Apply through their Google Form for upcoming events.

name: Zuitzerland
tagline: Developing decentralized leadership models and an integrated network society
description: Zuitzerland is a popup village in Switzerland focused on developing new models for decentralized governance and network society. The project applies principles of defensive accelerationism and community building.
joinInfo: Apply through their application form.

name: Embassy Network
tagline: Creating place-based communities experimenting with new forms of governance and solidarity
description: The Embassy Network is a global network of place-based communities sharing resources and experimenting with new forms of living together. Houses in the network operate as coliving spaces with shared values.

location.label: USA, Costa Rica, Spain, Germany, Puerto Rico, Canada

joinInfo: Explore houses and apply through their website.

name: Closer
tagline: Pioneer the future of regenerative living through technology
description: Closer is building technology and communities for regenerative living. The platform helps communities coordinate, share resources, and build sustainable models for collective living.
joinInfo: Contact the team at team@closer.earth

name: Urbit
tagline: Creating a decentralized computing platform where users own their data and identity
description: Urbit is a new computing platform designed for personal sovereignty. Users have complete ownership of their data, identities, and services. The community is building a new internet from first principles.
joinInfo: Get started by acquiring an Urbit ID through their website.

name: Viva City
tagline: Building a city focused on longevity and advanced medicine
description: Viva City is a popup city initiative focused on longevity research, advanced medicine, and health optimization. The project brings together researchers, doctors, and health enthusiasts to advance human healthspan.
joinInfo: Join through their website.

name: VitaDAO
tagline: Community-owned collective funding longevity science research
description: VitaDAO is a decentralized autonomous organization dedicated to funding and advancing early-stage longevity science research. Since its founding, the biotech DAO has invested over $2.5 million into longevity projects, democratizing drug development through community governance.
joinInfo: Acquire VITA tokens to participate in governance and funding decisions.

name: Forma
tagline: Building Solana Economic Zones bridging crypto and national economies
description: Forma is a think tank creating Solana Economic Zones that bridge the gap between the Solana economy and national economies. Their first zone launched in Buenos Aires, Argentina in 2024, with expansion to Dubai and Kazakhstan.
joinInfo: Apply through their website for assemblies and programs.

name: Auroville
tagline: Universal township for human unity in Tamil Nadu, India
description: Auroville is the world's largest intentional community, founded in 1968 with representatives from 124 countries. Based on the teachings of Sri Aurobindo and The Mother, it has grown from barren land to a 3,000-acre township with over 3 million trees planted, practicing non-hierarchical governance.
joinInfo: Visit as a guest, volunteer, or apply for newcomer status through their website.

name: Findhorn Ecovillage
tagline: Europe's oldest ecovillage blending sustainability with spirituality
description: Findhorn began in 1962 when three people settled in a caravan by a remote Scottish bay. Now Europe's oldest ecovillage with around 500 residents, it's a founder member of the Global Ecovillage Network and holds the lowest recorded ecological footprint of any community in the industrialized world.
joinInfo: Attend programs and workshops, or apply for residency through their foundation.

name: Damanhur
tagline: Federation of spiritual communities with underground temples in Italy
description: Damanhur is a federation of self-sustaining communities in the Italian Alps, founded in 1975. Famous for its hand-carved underground Temples of Humankind, the community has its own constitution, currency (the Credito), and centers across Europe, America, Australia, and Japan.
joinInfo: Visit for tours of the Temples, attend courses, or inquire about citizenship.

name: Freetown Christiania
tagline: Self-governing anarchist commune in the heart of Copenhagen
description: Christiania was founded in 1971 when squatters occupied an abandoned military base in Copenhagen. Now home to about 1,000 residents across 34 hectares, it operates as a self-governing community with its own flag, consensus-driven governance, and is Copenhagen's fourth largest tourist attraction.
joinInfo: Visit freely; residency requires community approval and available housing.

name: Twin Oaks
tagline: Income-sharing egalitarian community inspired by Walden Two
description: Founded in 1967 and inspired by B.F. Skinner's Walden Two, Twin Oaks is one of the longest-enduring secular intentional communities in North America. About 100 people live on 450 acres in Virginia, sharing income and practicing cooperation, egalitarianism, and nonviolence.
joinInfo: Apply for a visitor period, then membership if mutually agreeable.

name: Dancing Rabbit Ecovillage
tagline: Sustainable living laboratory in rural Missouri
description: Dancing Rabbit is a 280-acre ecovillage in northeast Missouri founded in 1997 by Stanford students. Residents abide by ecological covenants promoting sustainability while maintaining individual autonomy. The community is growing toward a target of 500-1000 people.
joinInfo: Visit through their visitor program, then apply for residency.

name: NEOM / The Line
tagline: A 170km linear city redefining urban living in Saudi Arabia
description: The Line is a revolutionary linear city within NEOM, Saudi Arabia's $500 billion megaproject. Designed as two parallel mirrored skyscrapers stretching 170km across the desert, it aims to house 9 million residents with no cars, streets, or carbon emissions. Part of Saudi Vision 2030, it features its own governance structure separate from traditional Saudi institutions.
joinInfo: Opportunities available through NEOM careers and investment portals.

name: Catawba Digital Economic Zone
tagline: America's first jurisdiction built for fintech and digital assets
description: The Catawba Digital Economic Zone (CDEZ) is a sovereign regulatory zone created by the Catawba Indian Nation of the Carolinas. It's the first jurisdiction in the United States designed specifically for digital entrepreneurs, featuring crypto-friendly regulations, DAO legal structures, and fintech bank charters under the ULEX legal system.
joinInfo: Register your LLC or C-Corp through the Zone Authority website.

name: Dunia Cyber City
tagline: A $1 billion network state for digital nomads in Zanzibar
description: Dunia Cyber City is a special economic zone in Zanzibar developed in partnership with OurWorld. Inspired by the network state concept, it offers electronic residency for crypto developers and digital nomads. The project is part of Zanzibar's blockchain sandbox initiative and Tether partnership to become a global fintech hub.
joinInfo: Apply for electronic residency through the Dunia Cyber City portal.

name: Konza Technopolis
tagline: Africa's Silicon Savannah smart city in Kenya
description: Konza Technopolis is a $14.5 billion smart city project 60km south of Nairobi, Kenya. As a gazetted Special Economic Zone, it's East Africa's largest innovation hub, featuring data centers, tech campuses, and BPO facilities. The 5,000-acre master-planned city aims to drive Kenya's digital economy transformation.
joinInfo: Explore investment and residency opportunities through the Konza website.

name: Stead
tagline: Building regenerative villages across the Americas
description: Stead is developing a network of regenerative villages focused on sustainable living, permaculture, and community resilience. The project combines traditional village design with modern technology to create thriving local economies.
joinInfo: Apply through their website for village residency or membership.

name: Popup City Asia
tagline: Zuzalu-inspired gatherings across Asia
description: Popup City Asia organizes Zuzalu-style temporary communities across Asian cities, bringing together builders, researchers, and innovators for immersive multi-week experiences focused on technology, governance, and community building.
joinInfo: Apply for upcoming events through their website.

name: RadicalxChange
tagline: Reimagining the building blocks of democracy and markets
description: RadicalxChange is a global movement dedicated to reimagining capitalism and democracy. Founded on ideas from 'Radical Markets,' the community develops new mechanisms for governance, voting, property rights, and collective decision-making through research and experimentation.
joinInfo: Join through their website, attend events, or participate in working groups.

name: Common Ground
tagline: Building regenerative communities in Portugal
description: Common Ground is developing regenerative community projects in Portugal, combining permaculture, natural building, and intentional community living. The project focuses on land stewardship and creating models for sustainable rural development.
joinInfo: Visit for workshops or apply for residency through their website.

name: Pop Village
tagline: Month-long coliving experiences for remote workers in Europe
description: Pop Village creates temporary coliving communities in beautiful European locations, bringing together remote workers and digital nomads for month-long experiences. Each village focuses on work, wellness, and community building.
joinInfo: Apply through their website for upcoming villages.

name: Free State Project
tagline: 20,000 libertarians moving to New Hampshire for liberty in our lifetime
description: The Free State Project is a political migration movement founded in 2001 by Jason Sorens to recruit libertarians to move to New Hampshire. By concentrating liberty-minded individuals in one low-population state, the movement aims to create a stronghold for libertarian ideas. Over 6,000 'Free Staters' have already moved, with many elected to the 400-member NH House of Representatives.
joinInfo: Sign the statement of intent on fsp.org and plan your move to New Hampshire.

name: Free Commune of Peñadexo
tagline: Restoring an abandoned village in Spain as a liberty incubator
description: The Free Commune is restoring an abandoned village in Galicia, Spain, building a self-sufficient community based on permaculture principles and voluntary cooperation. Founded on the heritage of local tax rebellions, Peñadexo hosts festivals and aims to produce food for residents plus 50 additional people through sustainable agriculture.
joinInfo: Visit their website to learn about residency and volunteer opportunities.

name: Liberstad
tagline: Norway's private anarcho-capitalist city using cryptocurrency
description: Liberstad is a 370-acre private city in Southern Norway founded on voluntaryist principles. With no city council or government, essential services are managed by private entities and voluntary associations. The city uses its own cryptocurrency (CITY) on the City Chain blockchain platform, with residents still subject to Norwegian law.
joinInfo: Apply for membership and land purchase through their website.

name: Sark
tagline: A libertarian paradise in the Channel Islands with minimal taxation
description: Sark is a self-governing British Crown Dependency in the English Channel with about 500 residents. Often called a 'libertarian paradise,' it features no income tax or VAT, minimal employment law, and little government intervention. The island sets its own laws, bans automobiles, and operates with property-based taxation where residents aren't required to disclose income or assets.
joinInfo: Research residency requirements; no income tax but property-based levies apply.

name: Small Farm Cities Africa
tagline: Tech-enabled agricultural communities creating jobs in Malawi
description: Small Farm Cities Africa is a social impact startup building affordable, job-creating agricultural communities in Malawi. The model integrates commercial drip-irrigated greenhouse farming, poultry, aquaculture, and hyper-affordable housing to unlock home ownership and upward mobility for working-class Africans.
joinInfo: Contact through their website for investment or residency opportunities.
